sections.name: Archetype Use
sections.text: This feat can be used for one or more archetypes in addition to the listed classes. When selected this way, the feat does not have its class traits.

feat.name: Scattering in Spring
feat.text: You evade an incoming attack by twisting your enemy’s tactics in your favor. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to AC against the triggering attack. If the attack misses you, you can immediately attempt a Feint or Shove against the triggering attacker; if you roll a success, you get a critical success instead.

traits.name: Monk
traits.text: Abilities with this trait are from the monk class. A weapon with this trait is primarily used by monks.

archetype.name: Martial Artist
archetype.note: This archetype offers Scattering in Spring at a different level than displayed here.

feat.trigger: An enemy within your reach targets you with a melee attack, and you're aware of the attack.
